race.comment: MONDAY CHOICE (5) scored two back at Longreach but was below her best last time when eighth over 1280m at Emerald. Hard to beat in this suitable race. PANDA DRUM (1) finished 8 lengths from the winner in ninth over 1630m at Emerald last start, a less impressive effort than his sixth at Julia Creek the run before. Looks well placed from the inside alley so expect a much better run this time. ZOULY (11) was easily accounted for when seventh last start over 1200m at Longreach, beaten 6 lengths after a good first-up win there. Strips fitter third-up from the break and is worth plenty of thought. THE STONE MASON (6) resumed in fine fashion with a strong win at Emerald and can go right on with the job now.
